name: Order Samurai Anti-Drift Policy
scope: All live runtime, verification, and operator-facing control-plane code.
principles: Executable contracts are stronger than prose-only guidance.
Generated truth is authoritative for existence questions.
One canonical path layer must anchor all repo-local path construction.
Documentation parity is required for architectural changes.

rules.statement: No live runtime module may hardcode repo-local or machine-local absolute paths.
Artifacts that answer what exists must be generated from disk or source state, not curated by hand.
Repository health must aggregate through one operator-facing doctor command that surfaces blocking architectural failures.
Any change to architecture contracts must update the corresponding project docs in the same change.
No architecture improvement may be claimed complete until verifiers, doctor, and targeted tests have passed.

mergeGates: doc parity passes for architecture-changing work
releaseGates: doctor passes with zero blocking failures
